transactions.desc: The Orioles recalled Sanders from Triple-A Norfolk on Friday.
The Nationals recalled Ford from Triple-A Rochester on Friday.
The Reds optioned Johnson to Triple-A Louisville on Friday.
The Reds activated Myers (shoulder) from the 10-day injured list Friday.
The Rays recalled Englert from Triple-A Durham on Friday, Ryan Bass of Rays.tv reports.
The Red Sox recalled Gamboa from Triple-A Worcester on Friday, Chris Cotillo of MassLive.com reports.
Marlowe exercised an opt-out clause in his minor-league contract with the Athletics and became free agent Thursday, Ari Alexander of 7 News Boston reports.
The Orioles recalled Encarnacion-Strand from Triple-A Norfolk on Thursday, Jake Rill of MLB.com reports.
Jones cleared waivers Thursday and elected free agency, Todd Rosiak of the Milwaukee Journal Sentinel reports.
The Washington Nationals traded OF Robert Hassell to the Pittsburgh Pirates.
The Phillies recalled Johnson from Triple-A Lehigh Valley on Thursday.
The Mets designated Short for assignment Thursday.
The Mets reinstated Semien (hip) from the injured list Thursday.
The Pirates acquired Hassell from the Nationals on Thursday in exchange for cash considerations or a player to be named later.
The Reds have agreed to terms with Burns on a seven-year, $105 million contract extension, Jon Morosi of MLB Network reports.
The Athletics selected White's contract from Triple-A Las Vegas on Wednesday, Jeff Passan of ESPN.com reports.
The Athletics optioned Meneses to Triple-A Las Vegas on Wednesday, Jason Burke of Roundtable.io reports.
The Athletics recalled Basso from Triple-A Las Vegas on Wednesday, Jason Burke of Roundtable.io reports.
The Athletics optioned Serven to Triple-A Las Vegas on Wednesday, Jason Burke of Roundtable.io reports.
The Athletics optioned Barnett to Triple-A Las Vegas on Wednesday, Jason Burke of Roundtable.io reports.
The Athletics selected Tur's contract from Triple-A Las Vegas on Wednesday, Jason Burke of Roundtable.io reports.
The Athletics designated Civale for assignment Wednesday, Jason Burke of Roundtable.io reports.
The Padres recalled Brito from Triple-A El Paso on Wednesday.
Smith cleared waivers and was outrighted to Triple-A Reno on Wednesday, Alex Weiner of ArizonaSports.com reports.
The Houston Astros traded RHP Lance McCullers to the Milwaukee Brewers.
The Milwaukee Brewers traded INF Jadyn Fielder to the Houston Astros.
The Houston Astros traded LHP Colton Gordon to the Milwaukee Brewers.
The Astros acquired Fielder from the Brewers on Wednesday in exchange for Lance McCullers (shoulder), Colton Gordon and cash considerations.
The Brewers acquired Gordon, Lance McCullers (shoulder) and cash considerations from the Astros on Wednesday in exchange for Jadyn Fielder.
The Nationals activated Kranick (elbow) from the 60-day injured list Wednesday.
